patch.value: Error: --full-period is only supported for --view day|week|month. For agent UX, a constructive error suggesting alternatives (--from/--to) would be better than a bare rejection.
Calendar: allow --full-period for agenda view or improve error message

Calendar agenda view rejects --full-period with error. While agenda is unbounded, the error message could suggest using --from/--to instead. Alternatively, --full-period could be silently ignored for agenda, or agenda could support bounded periods.
Either --full-period works with agenda or error message suggests --from/--to alternative
